mapper.sql: id, title, artist_id, album_id, duration, audio_url, cover_url, lyric_url, lyrics, genre, language, release_year, status, uploader_id, play_count, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT s.id, s.title, s.artist_id, s.album_id, s.duration, s.audio_url, s.cover_url, s.lyric_url, s.lyrics, s.genre, s.language, s.release_year, s.status, s.uploader_id, s.play_count, s.created_time, s.updated_time FROM song s LEFT JOIN artist a ON s.artist_id = a.id LEFT JOIN album al ON s.album_id = al.id WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 WHEN a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, s.play_count DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM song s LEFT JOIN artist a ON s.artist_id = a.id LEFT JOIN album al ON s.album_id = al.id WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR al.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM song WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY play_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM song WHERE artist_id = #{artistId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM song WHERE album_id = #{albumId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_time ASC
SELECT genre AS genre, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM song WHERE genre IS NOT NULL AND genre != '' GROUP BY genre ORDER BY `count` DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO song (title, artist_id, album_id, duration, audio_url, cover_url, lyric_url, lyrics, genre, language, release_year, status, uploader_id, play_count) VALUES (#{title}, #{artistId}, #{albumId}, #{duration}, #{audioUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{lyricUrl}, #{lyrics}, #{genre}, #{language}, #{releaseYear}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{uploaderId}, COALESCE(#{playCount}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE song SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
